description_long: This is a dark-colored bottle with a distinctive red label wrapped around its midsection, featuring the iconic Coca-Cola branding in white script. The bottle has a classic contoured shape, narrowing at the neck and widening towards the base, reminiscent of traditional glass soda bottles. The surface appears rough and irregular, suggesting either a worn or scanned texture, with some jagged edges and unevenness visible throughout. The cap area is slightly deformed, and the overall silhouette is not perfectly smooth, indicating possible damage or scanning artifacts. The label is the most visually prominent feature, with its bright red color and white text standing out against the dark body. The bottle appears empty, with no visible liquid inside.
description: A dark, contoured bottle with a red Coca-Cola label and a rough, irregular surface, showing signs of deformation and wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Coca-Cola label prominently, with the bottle's neck and cap area visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated body and the full extent of the red label, with the bottle lying horizontally.
description_view_2: Top-down view showing the circular cap area and the label wrapping around the bottle's midsection.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the label visible and the bottle's irregular, jagged surface more apparent.
attribute_label_or_branding: Red Coca-Cola label with white script text, wrapped around the midsection of the bottle.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Visible deformation and roughness throughout the surface, especially around the cap and body; no cracks or major breaks.
